parameters.query: SELECT s.id, s.requester_phone, s.owner_phone, s.context, (SELECT string_agg(m.direction||': '||m.text, ' | ' ORDER BY m.sent_at DESC) FROM (SELECT direction, text, sent_at FROM sanad.masaed_messages WHERE session_id=s.id ORDER BY sent_at DESC LIMIT 12) m) AS history FROM sanad.masaed_sessions s WHERE s.status='active' AND (s.requester_phone='{{ $json.sender }}' OR s.owner_phone='{{ $json.sender }}') LIMIT 1
